posts.community: VRL Logistics - value unlocking due to promoter actions
posts.text: image 737×268 16.2 KB Good results by the company. YoY is not much comparable as this is before doing the strategic discontinuation of the low margin contract. QoQ performance is good. Added 44 branches, 187 net vehicles and invested 180cr in CAPEX in Q4FY26.
